sizing_rule.note: Scale position size inversely to current drawdown relative to LEED threshold. Maintain full allocation (1.0x) only when portfolio drawdown from peak is below 15% of maximum tolerable equity drop (LEED). Reduce position size as drawdown risk approaches or exceeds this threshold.

source_rule_text: A trader should size positions inversely to their maximum tolerable equity drawdown—reducing position size when drawdown risk is high and scaling positions according to the largest expected equity drop (LEED) they can endure.
